title: Circuit Complexity Metrics
description: Master the essential metrics for quantifying quantum circuit complexity including depth, width, gate counts, and connectivity measures that determine execution feasibility and performance on real hardware.
learningObjectives: Calculate circuit depth and critical path length for arbitrary quantum circuits
Analyze gate count metrics including total gates, two-qubit gates, and gate type distribution
Evaluate circuit width and qubit connectivity requirements
Compute circuit volume and spacetime overhead metrics
Apply complexity metrics to compare circuit implementations and optimization strategies
